title: LEGO Star Wars 75427 SMART Play: Throne Room Duel & A-Wing - All-in-One Interactive Toy Set incl. 2 SMART Bricks, 5 Tags, 3 Minifigures & Charger - Gift Idea for 9+ Year Old Boys, Girls & Adult Fans
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: INTERACTIVE STAR WARS BUILDING TOY – This LEGO SMART Play All-in-One set features 2 SMART Bricks with a charger, 5 SMART Tags and 3 SMART Minifigures that power up immersive play, reacting to your every move

THE GALAXY PLAYS BACK – When placed on top of the SMART Tag in the throne, duelling platforms, A-wing or turret, the SMART Brick responds to motion and colours with lights and sounds or even plays “The Imperial March”
3 LEGO SMART MINIFIGURES – The SMART Brick brings SMART Luke Skywalker, SMART Emperor Palpatine and SMART Darth Vader minifigures to life by revealing their unique voices and reactions

SCREEN-FREE PLAYTIME – Join friends and family to recreate iconic battle scenes from Return of the Jedi: engage in Lightsaber duels with dynamic reactions and role-play an A-wing attack on the Death Star
STAR WARS GIFT FOR KIDS – Treat a fan to this responsive building toy, which makes an out-of-this-world birthday gift idea for 9+ year old boys and girls, as well as teenage or adult collectors

LEGO SMART ASSIST APP – Get started, troubleshoot, control sound levels, download updates or activate a built-in microphone for potential future features (its activation will require both your permission and a firmware update)

SMART BRICK FEATURES – Offers 45 minutes of battery life per charge and is compatible with other SMART Play sets for expanded adventures (please note, the SMART Brick is not available to purchase as a stand-alone product)
description: From the manufacturer Interactive building toy The galaxy plays back Bring epic Star Wars: Return of the Jedi scenes to life with responsive sounds and lights powered by the LEGO SMART Play system. This All-in-One Set offers kids hours of screen-free, imaginative play. Previous page Realistic flight sounds Hear engine sounds change as the A-wing is swooshed in different directions. Battle with friends Kids can role-play as SMART Luke Skywalker and SMART Darth Vader in dynamic Lightsaber duels with sounds that respond to how they move. Relive classic scenes Listen to “The Imperial March” playing as SMART Emperor Palpatine sits on his throne. Death Star turret Hear the whirr of the turret as it’s turned left and right. Next page Previous page 5 SMART Tags SMART Tags activate the SMART Bricks, which respond to how kids move and play. 2 SMART Bricks The brains of the operation, responding to different movements, colours and more. SMART Brick charger The charger generates approx. 45 minutes of SMART Play action per charge. 3 LEGO SMART Minifigures Bring the LEGO SMART Minifigures to life via the SMART Brick and hear their instant reactions to different situations. Next page The video showcases the product in use. The video guides you through product setup. The video compares multiple products. The video shows the product being unpacked.
